title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Today's moderation review addressed 2 high-severity reports:

1. spam_wave_42 — Banned. Posted phishing links across 6 channels in under 20 minutes. No warning issued; the scale and speed of the abuse warranted immediate removal.

2. toxic_runner — Banned. Engaged in repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Behavior was verified across multiple reports and showed no sign of improvement.

Both reports have been closed. If you believe either action was taken in error, please submit an appeal through the standard moderation channel.

Remaining open reports (medium/low severity) are under review and will be addressed in the next cycle.
